name: constitution
description_raw: Create or update the project constitution from interactive or provided principle inputs, ensuring all dependent templates stay in sync.
description_normalized: Establishes or updates the project constitution — the foundational principles that govern all subsequent spec-kit phases.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Create or update the project constitution from interactive or provided principle inputs, ensuring all dependent templates stay in sync.

handoffs.label: Build Specification
handoffs.prompt: Implement the feature specification based on the updated constitution. I want to build...

name: specify
description_raw: Create or update the feature specification from a natural language feature description.
description_normalized: Converts a natural-language feature description into a structured spec.md artifact.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Create or update the feature specification from a natural language feature description.

handoffs.label: Build Technical Plan
handoffs.prompt: Create a plan for the spec. I am building with...

name: clarify
description_raw: Identify underspecified areas in the current feature spec by asking up to 5 highly targeted clarification questions and encoding answers back into the spec.
description_normalized: Surfaces up to 5 clarification questions for an existing spec and encodes the answers back into spec.md.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Identify underspecified areas in the current feature spec by asking up to 5 highly targeted clarification questions and encoding answers back into the spec.

handoffs.label: Build Technical Plan
handoffs.prompt: Create a plan for the spec. I am building with...

name: plan
description_raw: Execute the implementation planning workflow using the plan template to generate design artifacts.
description_normalized: Generates a plan.md from the feature spec using the plan template and produces design artifacts.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Execute the implementation planning workflow using the plan template to generate design artifacts.

handoffs.label: Create Checklist
handoffs.prompt: Create a checklist for the following domain...

name: tasks
description_raw: Generate an actionable, dependency-ordered tasks.md for the feature based on available design artifacts.
description_normalized: Produces a dependency-ordered tasks.md from the plan and spec artifacts.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Generate an actionable, dependency-ordered tasks.md for the feature based on available design artifacts.

handoffs.label: Analyze For Consistency
handoffs.prompt: Run a project analysis for consistency

name: checklist
description_raw: Generate a custom checklist for the current feature based on user requirements.
description_normalized: Creates a requirements-quality checklist — unit tests for the spec's completeness and clarity, not for implementation verification.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Generate a custom checklist for the current feature based on user requirements.

name: analyze
description_raw: Perform a non-destructive cross-artifact consistency and quality analysis across spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md after task generation.
description_normalized: Read-only consistency gate that cross-checks spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md before implementation is allowed to proceed.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Perform a non-destructive cross-artifact consistency and quality analysis across spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md after task generation.

name: implement
description_raw: Execute the implementation plan by processing and executing all tasks defined in tasks.md
description_normalized: Drives code implementation by sequentially executing each task from tasks.md.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Execute the implementation plan by processing and executing all tasks defined in tasks.md

name: taskstoissues
description_raw: Convert existing tasks into actionable, dependency-ordered GitHub Issues for the feature based on available design artifacts.
description_normalized: Converts tasks.md entries into GitHub Issues via MCP, preserving dependency ordering.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Convert existing tasks into actionable, dependency-ordered GitHub issues for the feature based on available design artifacts.

name: speckit.git.feature
description_raw: Create a feature branch with sequential or timestamp numbering
description_normalized: Git extension command that creates a numbered feature branch before the specify phase begins.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Create a feature branch with sequential or timestamp numbering

name: speckit.git.commit
description_raw: Auto-commit changes after a Spec Kit command completes
description_normalized: Git extension command that auto-stages and commits all changes after any Spec Kit phase completes.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Auto-commit changes after a Spec Kit command completes

name: speckit.git.initialize
description_raw: Initialize a Git repository with an initial commit
description_normalized: Git extension command that initializes a Git repo with an initial commit if one does not already exist.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Initialize a Git repository with an initial commit

name: speckit.git.remote
description_raw: Detect Git remote URL for GitHub integration
description_normalized: Git extension command that detects the remote URL for GitHub MCP integration during taskstoissues.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Detect Git remote URL for GitHub integration

name: speckit.git.validate
description_raw: Validate current branch follows feature branch naming conventions
description_normalized: Git extension command that validates the active branch conforms to spec-kit feature branch naming rules.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Validate current branch follows feature branch naming conventions

name: selftest
description_raw: Validate the lifecycle of an extension from the catalog.
description_normalized: Selftest extension command that simulates the full developer experience for a catalog extension from install through use.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Validate the lifecycle of an extension from the catalog.

name: lean.constitution
description_raw: Create or update the project constitution.
description_normalized: Lean preset override of constitution — stripped of optional steps for faster team adoption.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Create or update the project constitution.

name: lean.specify
description_raw: Create a specification and store it in spec.md.
description_normalized: Lean preset override of specify — stripped-down command for teams prioritizing speed over thoroughness.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Create a specification and store it in spec.md.

name: lean.plan
description_raw: Create a plan and store it in plan.md.
description_normalized: Lean preset override of plan — minimal planning variant for teams who skip clarify and checklist phases.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Create a plan and store it in plan.md.

name: lean.tasks
description_raw: Create the tasks needed for implementation and store them in tasks.md.
description_normalized: Lean preset override of tasks — minimal task-generation variant without analyze gate.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Create the tasks needed for implementation and store them in tasks.md.

name: lean.implement
description_raw: Execute the implementation plan by processing all tasks in tasks.md.
description_normalized: Lean preset override of implement — stripped variant that processes tasks.md without optional extension hooks.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Execute the implementation plan by processing all tasks in tasks.md.

name: scaffold.specify
description_raw: Create a feature specification (preset override)
description_normalized: Scaffold preset override of specify — demonstrates how to create a custom specify variant when building a new preset.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Create a feature specification (preset override)

name: self-test.specify
description_raw: Self-test override of the specify command
description_normalized: Self-test preset override of specify — used to validate the lifecycle of the specify phase during automated preset testing.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Self-test override of the specify command

name: self-test.wrap-test
description_raw: Self-test wrap command — pre/post around core
description_normalized: Self-test preset wrap command that injects pre/post logic around a core command template using the wrap strategy.

frontmatter_yaml.description: Self-test wrap command — pre/post around core
